branches.polygonRecommendedFlow: Recommended flow: search the area, click Generate starter zone, drag numbered points, then click map edges or nearby areas to add more points.

loyalty.pageDescription: Configure loyalty rules, point redemption, and manually adjust customer points.
loyalty.branchPageDescription: View loyalty settings and customers for your assigned branch.
loyalty.missingRestaurant: Restaurant context is missing. Loyalty settings require a restaurant ID.
loyalty.programSettingsDescription: Configure how customers earn, redeem, and convert loyalty points.
loyalty.branchReadOnlyNotice: Branch admins can review the loyalty program and customer balances. Program edits stay restricted to restaurant admins.
loyalty.pointsPerCurrencyUnitHelper: How many points a customer earns per 1 currency unit spent.
loyalty.currencyAmountPerPointHelper: How much currency spend is required to generate one point.
loyalty.redemptionValuePerPointHelper: Currency value received when one point is redeemed.
loyalty.minimumRedeemPointsHelper: Minimum points required before customer can redeem.
loyalty.pointsExpiryDaysHelper: Number of days after which loyalty points expire. Use 0 if expiry is disabled.
loyalty.programControlsDescription: Enable or disable earning, wallet conversion, and order discount usage.
loyalty.programActiveDescription: Customers can earn and redeem loyalty points.
loyalty.allowWalletConversionDescription: Customers can convert loyalty points into wallet balance.
loyalty.allowOrderDiscountDescription: Customers can use loyalty points as order discounts.
loyalty.customerLoyaltyBranchDescription: Select a branch customer and review loyalty summary/history.
loyalty.customerLoyaltyDescription: Select a customer, review loyalty history, and manually add or deduct points.
loyalty.selectCustomerLoyaltyDescription: Search and select a customer to view loyalty summary and transaction history.
loyalty.loyaltyHistoryDescription: Points credit and debit history for this customer.
loyalty.emptyHistory: No loyalty history found for this customer.
loyalty.adjustLoyaltyPointsDescription: Manually add or deduct loyalty points for this customer.

validation.branchProgramReadOnly: Branch admin can view loyalty settings but cannot update the program
validation.branchAdjustmentReadOnly: Branch admin can view loyalty data but cannot manually adjust points

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: View and manage all Restaurants from here

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noActiveChannelsDescription: Enable at least one channel to configure notification type preferences.

legalProfile.title: Legal & Tax Profile
legalProfile.description: Manage the restaurant legal business identity, tax number, business address, and contract text reflected in customer legal content.
legalProfile.editable: Business admins can update this profile.
legalProfile.readOnly: Branch admins can review this profile.
legalProfile.completionDescription: Business name, tax number, address, and contract text.
legalProfile.publicReflectionDescription: Customer-facing privacy APIs include this profile automatically.
legalProfile.branchReadOnlyNotice: Branch admins can view this legal profile, but updates are restricted to business admins.
legalProfile.businessSectionDescription: This is the legal identity customers and public legal pages can reference.
legalProfile.addressSectionDescription: Use the registered office or tax address for legal display.
legalProfile.contractTextPlaceholder: Restaurant legal contract or policy text shown with customer legal content.
legalProfile.emptyContract: No contract/legal text has been published yet.
legalProfile.readOnlyToast: Only business admins can update the legal profile.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Manage the customer-app privacy policy shown in the public popup and customer-facing experiences.
privacyPolicy.editorDescription: Write naturally and format the policy with headings, lists, colors, links, and emphasis. The saved value is still sent as privacyPolicy to restaurant customer-app content.
privacyPolicy.placeholder: Write the restaurant privacy policy here. Use the toolbar above to format it.
privacyPolicy.previewDescription: Sandboxed preview of how the policy content will read in the popup.
privacyPolicy.publicPageDescription: Share or open the published privacy policy page customers can read.
